input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 3.2.21 test suite already contains specialized internal coverage for JDK-access handling and deprecated SecurityManager paths; failures for 3.3.5/JDK 25 appear to be test/library behavior compatibility issues rather than missing setup.
If generated tests retain deep internal AccessibleObjectHandler or SecurityManager assertions, they may need careful JDK-25-aware test logic, but that is not an external setup prerequisite.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process Java expression language; the resolved 3.3.5 artifact brings its required Javassist runtime dependency transitively and normal usage is parsing/evaluating expressions against POJOs, so no extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed before meaningful coverage is reachable.
